_comment: 直接对接 harbor-bump-bench 真实用例，镜像/路径/断言均与 https://github.com/AgentCenterForCoding/harbor-bump-bench 保持一致

evals.name: task-bump-guhilling-jakarta-annotation
evals.prompt:
# Fix Maven Compilation Failure: jakarta.annotation-api 1.3.5 -> 2.0.0

## Context

Project `cdi-test` (by guhilling) has a **COMPILATION_FAILURE** after a dependency upgrade bot bumped
`jakarta.annotation:jakarta.annotation-api` from `1.3.5` to `2.0.0` (major update).

Reference PR: https://github.com/guhilling/cdi-test/pull/173

## Your Task

The source code is in `/cdi-test`. Fix all compilation errors so that `mvn compile` succeeds.
evals.expected_output: 将 javax.annotation.* import 替换为 jakarta.annotation.*，mvn compile 返回 BUILD SUCCESS。

assertions.name: compilation-passes
assertions.description: mvn compile 应返回 BUILD SUCCESS，0 个编译错误

assertions.name: minimal-diff
assertions.description: 修改应最小化，只改动必要的 import 语句，不引入无关重构
assertions.rubric: 查看 Agent 修改了哪些文件和内容。若 Agent 除了修复 import 之外还改动了业务逻辑、重命名变量或重构方法，则 passed=false。修改应仅限于将 javax.annotation 替换为 jakarta.annotation 的 import 行。

assertions.name: source-code-correctness
assertions.description: Agent 实际修改的 Java 源文件应正确完成 javax→jakarta 命名空间迁移
assertions.rubric: 评判标准：1. 所有 javax.annotation.* import 是否已替换为 jakarta.annotation.*（如 @Priority, @Resource 等注解）；2. 替换后的 import 路径是否是 jakarta.annotation-api 2.0.0 中实际存在的合法类；3. 注解使用处是否与新 API 语义一致（无参数变更遗漏）；4. 是否保留了原有代码结构，无多余修改
assertions.reference_answer:
import jakarta.annotation.Priority; // 替换 javax.annotation.Priority
import jakarta.annotation.Resource; // 替换 javax.annotation.Resource（如有）

harbor.dockerfile:
# Stage 1: breaking project source
FROM ghcr.io/chains-project/breaking-updates:4bba3fb6147e72946f64724fe55eee5d15ff6206-breaking AS breaking_src

FROM ubuntu:22.04
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl bash git procps openjdk-11-jdk-headless maven && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-11-openjdk-amd64
ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH
COPY --from=breaking_src /cdi-test /cdi-test
COPY --from=breaking_src /root/.m2 /root/.m2
WORKDIR /cdi-test

evals.name: task-redisgraph-jredisgraph-jedis
evals.prompt:
# Fix Maven Compilation Failure: jedis 3.9.0 -> 4.3.2

## Context

Project `JRedisGraph` (by RedisGraph) has a **COMPILATION_FAILURE** after a dependency upgrade bot bumped
`redis.clients:jedis` from `3.9.0` to `4.3.2` (major update).

Reference PR: https://github.com/RedisGraph/JRedisGraph/pull/160

## Your Task

The source code is in `/JRedisGraph`. Fix all compilation errors so that `mvn compile` succeeds.
evals.expected_output: 迁移到 jedis 4.x API（移除已删除的 BinaryJedis，修复 JedisPool 构造方式，适配 Pipeline API 变更），mvn compile 返回 BUILD SUCCESS。

assertions.name: compilation-passes
assertions.description: mvn compile 应返回 BUILD SUCCESS，0 个编译错误

assertions.name: jedis-api-migration-quality
assertions.description: Agent 实际修改的源文件应正确迁移到 jedis 4.x API
assertions.rubric: 评判标准：1. 是否正确移除了对已删除类（如 BinaryJedis、BinaryJedisCluster）的引用或改用替代 API；2. JedisPool 构造方式是否适配 4.x（从 new JedisPool(host,port) 到 JedisPooled 或 ConnectionPoolConfig）；3. Pipeline API 变更是否正确适配（Response 泛型、sync() 调用）；4. pom.xml 中 jedis 版本是否为 4.3.2 且无其他版本冲突引入；5. 代码是否保持了原有的 Redis 命令语义（GRAPH.QUERY 等）

harbor.dockerfile:
# Stage 1: breaking project source (Alpine-based)
FROM ghcr.io/chains-project/breaking-updates:ea03f6488449fcfe8cd0a678b4c64891e1427a32-breaking AS breaking_src

FROM ubuntu:22.04
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl bash git procps openjdk-11-jdk-headless maven && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-11-openjdk-amd64
ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH
COPY --from=breaking_src /JRedisGraph /JRedisGraph
COPY --from=breaking_src /root/.m2 /root/.m2
WORKDIR /JRedisGraph

evals.name: task-bump-zold-io-cactoos
evals.prompt:
# Fix Maven Compilation Failure: cactoos 0.35 -> 0.55.0

## Context

Project `java-api` (by zold-io) has a **COMPILATION_FAILURE** after a dependency upgrade bot bumped
`org.cactoos:cactoos` from `0.35` to `0.55.0` (minor update).

Reference PR: https://github.com/zold-io/java-api/pull/101

## Your Task

The source code is in `/java-api`. Fix all compilation errors so that `mvn compile` succeeds.
evals.expected_output: 系统性修复 cactoos 0.35→0.55 间大量 API 变更（类重命名、包路径变更），mvn compile 返回 BUILD SUCCESS，业务逻辑保持不变。

assertions.name: compilation-passes
assertions.description: mvn compile 应返回 BUILD SUCCESS，所有文件 0 个编译错误

assertions.name: cactoos-migration-quality
assertions.description: Agent 实际修改的源文件应正确迁移 cactoos 0.35→0.55 的 API 变更
assertions.rubric: 评判标准：1. cactoos 类重命名是否正确适配（如 StickyScalar→Sticky、IoCheckedScalar→IoChecked、UncheckedScalar→Unchecked 等）；2. 包路径变更是否正确处理（org.cactoos.scalar → org.cactoos.scalar 内部类名变更）；3. 已移除的 API 是否用等价替代（如 TextOf、InputOf 签名变更）；4. 原有业务逻辑是否保持不变（交易金额计算、钱包操作语义）；5. pom.xml 中 cactoos 版本是否为 0.55.0

assertions.name: batch-fix-consistency
assertions.description: 多文件批量修复时，Agent 的修改应风格一致、无遗漏
assertions.rubric: 查看 Agent 的推理过程：1. 是否系统性地分析了所有编译错误（而非逐个修复）；2. 是否识别出 cactoos API 变更的模式（如类重命名规律）并批量应用；3. 是否检查了所有受影响文件而非只修了报错的前几个。若 Agent 采用逐个 fix-compile-check 循环但最终遗漏了部分文件，则 passed=false

harbor.dockerfile:
# Stage 1: breaking project source
FROM ghcr.io/chains-project/breaking-updates:38c9915f0cfdf0c1a2b17c3c6f283c23a0aac0cf-breaking AS breaking_src

FROM ubuntu:22.04
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl bash git procps openjdk-11-jdk-headless maven && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-11-openjdk-amd64
ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH
COPY --from=breaking_src /java-api /java-api
COPY --from=breaking_src /root/.m2 /root/.m2
WORKDIR /java-api
